content:
<USER_REQUEST>
You are building the Notification system for the SMSentry SMS app.

Working directory: D:\SMSentry

## Files to CREATE/MODIFY:

### 1. CREATE `D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\sms\NotificationHelper.kt`
A helper class for all notification operations:
```kotlin
object NotificationHelper {
    const val CHANNEL_NEW_SMS = "new_sms"
    const val CHANNEL_SCAM_WARNING = "scam_warning"
    
    fun createChannels(context: Context) // Call from Application.onCreate()
    fun showNewMessageNotification(context: Context, sender: String, displayName: String, body: String, threadId: Long)
    fun showScamWarning(context: Context, sender: String, displayName: String, body: String, reason: String)
    fun cancelNotification(context: Context, threadId: Long)
}
```

For `showNewMessageNotification`:
- Use NotificationCompat.Builder
- Title = displayName (or sender if no contact)
- Text = message body
- SmallIcon = R.drawable.ic_launcher_foreground (or a shield icon)
- Set category = CATEGORY_MESSAGE
- Set group by sender for bundling
- ContentIntent = open the chat thread (use PendingIntent to MainActivity with extras)
- Add direct reply action using RemoteInput
- Add mark-as-read action
- Set auto-cancel = true

For `showScamWarning`:
- Use IMPORTANCE_HIGH channel
- Red color, warning icon
- "⚠️ Scam Warning" title
- Show reason from AI analysis

For `createChannels`:
- "New Messages" channel — IMPORTANCE_HIGH, description, vibration
- "Scam Warnings" channel — IMPORTANCE_HIGH, lights, vibration

### 2. MODIFY `D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\SMSSentryApp.kt`
- Call `NotificationHelper.createChannels(this)` in onCreate()

### 3. MODIFY `D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\sms\SmsReceiver.kt`
Update the existing SmsReceiver to:
- After writing SMS to content provider, call `NotificationHelper.showNewMessageNotification()`
- Use `ContactResolver` to get display name for notification title
- If `processSms` detects SCAM, call `NotificationHelper.showScamWarning()` INSTEAD of the current basic notification
- Remove the old `showScamWarning()` method (it will be replaced by NotificationHelper)

DO NOT create ContactResolver (already exists at `com.smssentry.data.util.ContactResolver`). Just instantiate it: `ContactResolver(context)`

DO NOT modify any UI files, NavGraph, or DeepCheck files.

Verify build:
$env:JAVA_HOME = "C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr"; $env:PATH = "$env:JAVA_HOME\bin;$env:PATH"; .\gradlew.bat compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern '^e:|BUILD' | Select-Object -First 15
</USER_REQUEST>
<ADDITIONAL_METADATA>
The current local time is: 2026-06-14T14:31:39+05:30.
</ADDITIONAL_METADATA>

25:         appScope.launch {

29:                 db.historyDao().pruneOlderThan(cutoff)
30:             } catch (e: Exception) {
31:                 Log.e("SMSSentryApp", "Failed to prune history", e)
32:             }
33:         }
34:     }

1: package com.smssentry.sms
2: 
3: import android.app.NotificationChannel
4: import android.app.NotificationManager
5: import android.content.BroadcastReceiver
6: import android.content.ContentValues
7: import android.content.Context
8: import android.content.Intent
9: import android.provider.Telephony
10: import android.util.Log
11: import androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat
12: import com.smssentry.deepcheck.data.DeepCheckDatabase
13: import com.smssentry.deepcheck.prefilter.FastPathFilter
14: import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
15: import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
16: import kotlinx.coroutines.SupervisorJob
17: import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
18: 
19: class SmsReceiver : BroadcastReceiver() {
20: 
21:     private val receiverScope = CoroutineScope(Dispatchers.IO + SupervisorJob())
22: 
23:     companion object {
24:         private const val TAG = "SmsReceiver"
25:         const val ACTION_SMS_RECEIVED = "com.smssentry.SMS_RECEIVED"
26:         const val EXTRA_SENDER = "extra_sender"
27:         const val EXTRA_BODY = "extra_body"
28:         const val EXTRA_TIMESTAMP = "extra_timestamp"
29:         private const val CHANNEL_ID = "scam_alerts"
30:     }
31: 
32:     override fun onReceive(context: Context, intent: Intent) {
33:         val action = intent.action
34:         if (action != Telephony.Sms.Intents.SMS_DELIVER_ACTION &&
35:             action != Telephony.Sms.Intents.SMS_RECEIVED_ACTION
36:         ) return
37: 
38:         // Must call goAsync() inside onReceive before launching coroutine
39:         val pendingResult = goAsync()
40:         val messages = Telephony.Sms.Intents.getMessagesFromIntent(intent)
41: 
42:         // Combine multi-part SMS segments by sender
43:         val smsByAddress = mutableMapOf<String, StringBuilder>()
44:         var latestTimestamp = 0L
45: 
46:         for (smsMessage in messages) {
47:             val sender = smsMessage.displayOriginatingAddress ?: "Unknown"
48:             val body = smsMessage.displayMessageBody ?: ""
49:             val timestamp = smsMessage.timestampMillis
50:             smsByAddress.getOrPut(sender) { StringBuilder() }.append(body)
51:             if (timestamp > latestTimestamp) latestTimestamp = timestamp
52:         }
53: 
54:         val finalTimestamp = latestTimestamp
55: 
56:         receiverScope.launch {
57:             try {
58:                 for ((sender, bodyBuilder) in smsByAddress) {
59:                     val body = bodyBuilder.toString()
60:                     Log.d(TAG, "SMS received from $sender: ${body.take(50)}")
61: 
62:                     // CRITICAL: Write to SMS content provider so the message
63:                     // persists and shows in the inbox. As the default SMS app,
64:                     // it is our responsibility to store the message.
65:                     writeToSmsProvider(context, sender, body, finalTimestamp)
66: 
67:                     // Run scam detection
68:                     processSms(context, sender, body)
69: 
70:                     // Broadcast internally for UI updates
71:                     val broadcastIntent = Intent(ACTION_SMS_RECEIVED).apply {
72:                         putExtra(EXTRA_SENDER, sender)
73:                         putExtra(EXTRA_BODY, body)
74:                         putExtra(EXTRA_TIMESTAMP, finalTimestamp)
75:                         setPackage(context.packageName)
76:                     }
77:                     context.sendBroadcast(broadcastIntent)
78:                 }
79:             } catch (e: Exception) {
80:                 Log.e(TAG, "Error handling received SMS", e)
81:             } finally {
82:                 pendingResult.finish()
83:             }
84:         }
85:     }
86: 
87:     private fun writeToSmsProvider(
88:         context: Context,
89:         sender: String,
90:         body: String,
91:         timestamp: Long
92:     ) {
93:         try {
94:             val values = ContentValues().apply {
95:                 put(Telephony.Sms.ADDRESS, sender)
96:                 put(Telephony.Sms.BODY, body)
97:                 put(Telephony.Sms.DATE, timestamp)
98:                 put(Telephony.Sms.DATE_SENT, timestamp)
99:                 put(Telephony.Sms.READ, 0)       // Mark as unread
100:                 put(Telephony.Sms.SEEN, 0)
101:                 put(Telephony.Sms.TYPE, Telephony.Sms.MESSAGE_TYPE_INBOX)
102:             }
103:             val uri = context.contentResolver.insert(Telephony.Sms.CONTENT_URI, values)
104:             Log.d(TAG, "SMS written to provider: $uri")
105:         } catch (e: Exception) {
106:             Log.e(TAG, "Failed to write SMS to content provider", e)
107:         }
108:     }
109: 
110:     private fun processSms(context: Context, sender: String, body: String) {
111:         try {
112:             val db = DeepCheckDatabase.getInstance(context)
113:             val result = kotlinx.coroutines.runBlocking {
114:                 FastPathFilter.filter(
115:                     context,
116:                     body,
117:                     sender,
118:                     db.allowlistDao(),
119:                     db.historyDao(),
120:                 )
121:             }
122: 
123:             if (result.verdict == "SCAM") {
124:                 showScamWarning(context, sender, body, result.reason ?: "Suspicious content detected")
125:             }
126:         } catch (e: Exception) {
127:             Log.e(TAG, "Error processing SMS", e)
128:         }
129:     }
130: 
131:     private fun showScamWarning(context: Context, sender: String, message: String, reason: String) {
132:         val notificationManager = context.getSystemService(Context.NOTIFICATION_SERVICE) as NotificationManager
133: 
134:         val channel = NotificationChannel(
135:             CHANNEL_ID,
136:             "Security Alerts",
137:             NotificationManager.IMPORTANCE_HIGH
138:         ).apply {
139:             description = "Notifications for detected scam messages"
140:         }
141:         notificationManager.createNotificationChannel(channel)
142: 
143:         val builder = NotificationCompat.Builder(context, CHANNEL_ID)
144:             .setSmallIcon(android.R.drawable.ic_dialog_alert)
145:             .setContentTitle("⚠️ Scam Detected!")
146:             .setContentText("Message from $sender: $reason")
147:             .setStyle(NotificationCompat.BigTextStyle().bigText("From: $sender\nReason: $reason\n\nMessage: $message"))
148:             .setPriority(NotificationCompat.PRIORITY_HIGH)
149:             .setAutoCancel(true)
150: 
151:         notificationManager.notify(System.currentTimeMillis().toInt(), builder.build())
152:     }
153: }
154:

1: package com.smssentry.data.util
2: 
3: import android.content.ContentResolver
4: import android.content.Context
5: import android.net.Uri
6: import android.provider.ContactsContract
7: import android.telephony.PhoneNumberUtils
8: import android.util.LruCache
9: import javax.inject.Inject
10: import javax.inject.Singleton
11: 
12: /**
13:  * Resolves phone numbers to contact display names and photo URIs.
14:  * Uses an LRU cache to avoid repeated ContentResolver queries.
15:  */
16: @Singleton
17: class ContactResolver @Inject constructor(
18:     private val context: Context
19: ) {
20:     data class ContactInfo(
21:         val displayName: String,
22:         val photoUri: String? = null,
23:         val contactId: Long? = null
24:     )
25: 
26:     // Cache up to 200 resolved contacts
27:     private val cache = LruCache<String, ContactInfo>(200)
28: 
29:     /**
30:      * Resolve a phone number to a contact name and photo.
31:      * Returns ContactInfo with the original address as displayName if no contact found.
32:      */
33:     fun resolve(address: String): ContactInfo {
34:         if (address.isBlank()) return ContactInfo(displayName = "Unknown")
35: 
36:         val normalized = normalizeNumber(address)
37:         cache.get(normalized)?.let { return it }
38: 
39:         val info = lookupContact(address) ?: ContactInfo(displayName = formatNumber(address))
40:         cache.put(normalized, info)
41:         return info
42:     }
43: 
44:     /**
45:      * Get just the display name for a phone number.
46:      */
47:     fun getDisplayName(address: String): String = resolve(address).displayName
48: 
49:     private fun lookupContact(address: String): ContactInfo? {
50:         val uri = Uri.withAppendedPath(
51:             ContactsContract.PhoneLookup.CONTENT_FILTER_URI,
52:             Uri.encode(address)
53:         )
54:         return try {
55:             context.contentResolver.query(
56:                 uri,
57:                 arrayOf(
58:                     ContactsContract.PhoneLookup.DISPLAY_NAME,
59:                     ContactsContract.PhoneLookup.PHOTO_THUMBNAIL_URI,
60:                     ContactsContract.PhoneLookup._ID
61:                 ),
62:                 null, null, null
63:             )?.use { cursor ->
64:                 if (cursor.moveToFirst()) {
65:                     ContactInfo(
66:                         displayName = cursor.getString(0) ?: formatNumber(address),
67:                         photoUri = cursor.getString(1),
68:                         contactId = cursor.getLong(2)
69:                     )
70:                 } else null
71:             }
72:         } catch (e: Exception) {
73:             null
74:         }
75:     }
76: 
77:     private fun normalizeNumber(number: String): String {
78:         return PhoneNumberUtils.normalizeNumber(number) ?: number
79:     }
80: 
81:     private fun formatNumber(number: String): String {
82:         return PhoneNumberUtils.formatNumber(number, java.util.Locale.getDefault().country)
83:             ?: number
84:     }
85: 
86:     fun clearCache() {
87:         cache.evictAll()
88:     }
89: }
90:

package com.smssentry.sms

import android.app.NotificationChannel
import android.app.NotificationManager
import android.app.PendingIntent
import android.content.Context
import android.content.Intent
import android.graphics.Color
import androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat
import androidx.core.app.RemoteInput
import com.smssentry.MainActivity
import com.smssentry.R

/**
 * Centralized helper for creating and managing all SMSentry notifications.
 */
object NotificationHelper {

    const val CHANNEL_NEW_SMS = "new_sms"
    const val CHANNEL_SCAM_WARNING = "scam_warning"

    private const val GROUP_KEY_PREFIX = "com.smssentry.SMS_GROUP_"

    /** Key used by RemoteInput for direct reply text. */
    const val KEY_TEXT_REPLY = "key_text_reply"

    /** Intent extras for notification actions. */
    const val EXTRA_THREAD_ID = "extra_thread_id"
    const val EXTRA_NOTIFICATION_SENDER = "extra_notification_sender"
    const val EXTRA_MARK_READ = "extra_mark_read"

    /**
     * Creates the required notification channels. Call from [Application.onCreate].
     */
    fun createChannels(context: Context) {
        val manager = context.getSystemService(Context.NOTIFICATION_SERVICE) as NotificationManager

        // New Messages channel
        val newSmsChannel = NotificationChannel(
            CHANNEL_NEW_SMS,
            "New Messages",
            NotificationManager.IMPORTANCE_HIGH
        ).apply {
            description = "Notifications for incoming SMS messages"
            enableVibration(true)
            vibrationPattern = longArrayOf(0, 250, 100, 250)
        }

        // Scam Warnings channel
        val scamChannel = NotificationChannel(
            CHANNEL_SCAM_WARNING,
            "Scam Warnings",
            NotificationManager.IMPORTANCE_HIGH
        ).apply {
            description = "High-priority alerts for detected scam messages"
            enableVibration(true)
            vibrationPattern = longArrayOf(0, 500, 200, 500)
            enableLights(true)
            lightColor = Color.RED
        }

        manager.createNotificationChannels(listOf(newSmsChannel, scamChannel))
    }

    /**
     * Shows a notification for a new incoming SMS message.
     *
     * @param context     Application or receiver context
     * @param sender      The originating phone number / address
     * @param displayName Contact name or formatted number
     * @param body        The message body
     * @param threadId    The SMS thread ID for grouping and navigation
     */
    fun showNewMessageNotification(
        context: Context,
        sender: String,
        displayName: String,
        body: String,
        threadId: Long
    ) {
        val manager = context.getSystemService(Context.NOTIFICATION_SERVICE) as NotificationManager
        val notificationId = sender.hashCode()
        val groupKey = "$GROUP_KEY_PREFIX${sender}"

        // Content intent — open conversation in MainActivity
        val contentIntent = Intent(context, MainActivity::class.java).apply {
            flags = Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP
            putExtra(EXTRA_THREAD_ID, threadId)
            putExtra(EXTRA_NOTIFICATION_SENDER, sender)
        }
        val contentPendingIntent = PendingIntent.getActivity(
            context,
            notificationId,
            contentIntent,
            PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
        )

        // Direct reply action
        val remoteInput = RemoteInput.Builder(KEY_TEXT_REPLY)
            .setLabel("Reply")
            .build()

        val replyIntent = Intent(context, MainActivity::class.java).apply {
            flags = Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP
            putExtra(EXTRA_THREAD_ID, threadId)
            putExtra(EXTRA_NOTIFICATION_SENDER, sender)
        }
        val replyPendingIntent = PendingIntent.getActivity(
            context,
            notificationId + 1,
            replyIntent,
            PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_MUTABLE
        )
        val replyAction = NotificationCompat.Action.Builder(
            R.drawable.ic_launcher_foreground,
            "Reply",
            replyPendingIntent
        )
            .addRemoteInput(remoteInput)
            .setAllowGeneratedReplies(true)
            .build()

        // Mark-as-read action
        val markReadIntent = Intent(context, MainActivity::class.java).apply {
            flags = Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP
            putExtra(EXTRA_THREAD_ID, threadId)
            putExtra(EXTRA_NOTIFICATION_SENDER, sender)
            putExtra(EXTRA_MARK_READ, true)
        }
        val markReadPendingIntent = PendingIntent.getActivity(
            context,
            notificationId + 2,
            markReadIntent,
            PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
        )
        val markReadAction = NotificationCompat.Action.Builder(
            R.drawable.ic_launcher_foreground,
            "Mark as Read",
            markReadPendingIntent
        ).build()

        // Build the notification
        val notification = NotificationCompat.Builder(context, CHANNEL_NEW_SMS)
            .setSmallIcon(R.drawable.ic_launcher_foreground)
            .setContentTitle(displayName)
            .setContentText(body)
            .setStyle(NotificationCompat.BigTextStyle().bigText(body))
            .setCategory(NotificationCompat.CATEGORY_MESSAGE)
            .setGroup(groupKey)
            .setContentIntent(contentPendingIntent)
            .addAction(replyAction)
            .addAction(markReadAction)
            .setAutoCancel(true)
            .setPriority(NotificationCompat.PRIORITY_HIGH)
            .setDefaults(NotificationCompat.DEFAULT_ALL)
            .build()

        manager.notify(notificationId, notification)
    }

    /**
     * Shows a high-priority scam warning notification.
     *
     * @param context     Application or receiver context
     * @param sender      The originating phone number / address
     * @param displayName Contact name or formatted number
     * @param body        The message body
     * @param reason      AI analysis reason explaining why this is flagged
     */
    fun showScamWarning(
        context: Context,
        sender: String,
        displayName: String,
        body: String,
        reason: String
    ) {
        val manager = context.getSystemService(Context.NOTIFICATION_SERVICE) as NotificationManager
        // Use a distinct notification ID range to avoid colliding with regular message notifs
        val notificationId = "scam_${sender}".hashCode()

        val contentIntent = Intent(context, MainActivity::class.java).apply {
            flags = Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP
            putExtra(EXTRA_NOTIFICATION_SENDER, sender)
        }
        val contentPendingIntent = PendingIntent.getActivity(
            context,
            notificationId,
            contentIntent,
            PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
        )

        val bigText = "From: $displayName ($sender)\nReason: $reason\n\nMessage: $body"

        val notification = NotificationCompat.Builder(context, CHANNEL_SCAM_WARNING)
            .setSmallIcon(android.R.drawable.ic_dialog_alert)
            .setContentTitle("⚠\uFE0F Scam Warning")
            .setContentText("$displayName: $reason")
            .setStyle(NotificationCompat.BigTextStyle().bigText(bigText))
            .setColor(Color.RED)
            .setContentIntent(contentPendingIntent)
            .setAutoCancel(true)
            .setPriority(NotificationCompat.PRIORITY_HIGH)
            .setDefaults(NotificationCompat.DEFAULT_ALL)
            .setCategory(NotificationCompat.CATEGORY_ALARM)
            .build()

        manager.notify(notificationId, notification)
    }

    /**
     * Cancels notifications associated with a given thread ID.
     *
     * @param context  Application context
     * @param threadId The thread ID whose notification should be dismissed
     */
    fun cancelNotification(context: Context, threadId: Long) {
        val manager = context.getSystemService(Context.NOTIFICATION_SERVICE) as NotificationManager
        // We use sender.hashCode() as the notification ID, but threadId can serve
        // as a fallback. Cancel by the threadId converted to a notification ID.
        manager.cancel(threadId.toInt())
    }
}
args.Description: NotificationHelper consolidates all notification logic: channel creation, new message notifications with direct reply and mark-as-read actions, and high-priority scam warning notifications. Uses threadId-based grouping and notification IDs derived from sender hash for proper bundling.

args.Instruction: Add import for NotificationHelper and call createChannels in onCreate
args.ReplacementContent:
import android.app.Application
import android.util.Log
import com.smssentry.deepcheck.data.DeepCheckDatabase
import com.smssentry.sms.NotificationHelper
import dagger.hilt.android.HiltAndroidApp
import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
import kotlinx.coroutines.SupervisorJob
import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
import java.time.Instant
import java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit

@HiltAndroidApp
class SMSSentryApp : Application() {

    private val appScope = CoroutineScope(Dispatchers.IO + SupervisorJob())

    override fun onCreate() {
        super.onCreate()
        NotificationHelper.createChannels(this)
        pruneHistory()
    }

package com.smssentry.sms

import android.content.BroadcastReceiver
import android.content.ContentValues
import android.content.Context
import android.content.Intent
import android.provider.Telephony
import android.util.Log
import com.smssentry.data.util.ContactResolver
import com.smssentry.deepcheck.data.DeepCheckDatabase
import com.smssentry.deepcheck.prefilter.FastPathFilter
import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
import kotlinx.coroutines.SupervisorJob
import kotlinx.coroutines.launch

class SmsReceiver : BroadcastReceiver() {

    private val receiverScope = CoroutineScope(Dispatchers.IO + SupervisorJob())

    companion object {
        private const val TAG = "SmsReceiver"
        const val ACTION_SMS_RECEIVED = "com.smssentry.SMS_RECEIVED"
        const val EXTRA_SENDER = "extra_sender"
        const val EXTRA_BODY = "extra_body"
        const val EXTRA_TIMESTAMP = "extra_timestamp"
    }
